highlights.text: Los Angeles (2N) → Las Vegas (3N) → Grand Canyon (1N) → San Francisco (2N)
Hollywood Walk of Fame & premium studio tour
Las Vegas Strip, Bellagio fountains & world-class entertainment
Grand Canyon breathtaking landscapes & Golden Gate Bridge
Serial US-002 | West Coast USA Family Tour

itinerary.title: West Coast USA Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Los Angeles • Las Vegas • Grand Canyon • San Francisco
itinerary.overview: Embark on an unforgettable journey across the iconic West Coast of the USA. From the dazzling lights of Los Angeles to the breathtaking landscapes of the Grand Canyon and the charm of San Francisco, TRAGUIN ensures a premium family holiday blending adventure, culture, and luxury.
itinerary.seo_title: US-002 | West Coast USA Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 08 Nights / 09 Days USA West Coast family package (US-002): Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Grand Canyon, and San Francisco.

days.title: Los Angeles — Arrival & Relaxation
days.description: Arrival in the City of Angels. Private transfer to your luxury hotel. Evening stroll at Santa Monica Pier for a scenic sunset.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport transfer, Santa Monica Pier sunset stroll
Overnight Stay: Los Angeles (Premium Family Hotel)
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Los Angeles — Hollywood Glamour
days.description: Discover iconic attractions including the Hollywood Walk of Fame and a premium studio tour.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Hollywood Walk of Fame, premium studio tour
Overnight Stay: Los Angeles (Premium Family Hotel)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Los Angeles to Las Vegas
days.description: Scenic drive to the world's entertainment capital, Las Vegas. Evening exploration of the famous Strip.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic private drive to Las Vegas, Strip evening exploration
Overnight Stay: Las Vegas (Premium Resort)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Las Vegas — Spectacular Entertainment
days.description: Experience exclusive shows and premium shopping. Evening fountain show at Bellagio.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Premium shopping, Bellagio fountain show
Overnight Stay: Las Vegas (Premium Resort)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Las Vegas — Grand Canyon Adventure
days.description: Witness the breathtaking landscapes of the Grand Canyon — a truly iconic attraction that defines American beauty.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Grand Canyon scenic visit and overlooks
Overnight Stay: Grand Canyon (Premium Lodge)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Grand Canyon to Las Vegas
days.description: Relaxing morning with stunning views, returning to Las Vegas for more leisure.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Grand Canyon morning views, return drive to Las Vegas
Overnight Stay: Las Vegas (Premium Resort)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Las Vegas to San Francisco
days.description: Flight to San Francisco. Transfer to hotel and evening visit to Fisherman's Wharf.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Domestic flight to San Francisco, Fisherman's Wharf evening visit
Overnight Stay: San Francisco (Premium Family Hotel)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: San Francisco — Cultural Exploration
days.description: Explore the Golden Gate Bridge and experience the city's unique culture and charm.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Golden Gate Bridge visit, San Francisco cultural exploration
Overnight Stay: San Francisco (Premium Family Hotel)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

days.title: Departure
days.description: Private transfer to the airport for your flight back home, carrying unforgettable memories.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport transfer
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast

inclusions.text: 08 Nights in handpicked premium family hotels across Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Grand Canyon, and San Francisco
Private luxury ground transfers throughout the itinerary
Hollywood Walk of Fame, studio tour, Grand Canyon, and Golden Gate Bridge sightseeing
Domestic flight Las Vegas to San Francisco
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International and internal domestic airfares unless stated
Optional tours, Broadway show entries, and specialized evening activities
Personal expenses, laundry, telephone calls, and boutique purchases
Optional helicopter rides or private boat charters
Comprehensive international travel and health insurance
Tipping, porterage fees, and newly introduced government surcharges
